items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to context-aware toolbars for your notes.
items.title: chrisgurney/obsidian-note-toolbar: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to context-aware toolbars for your notes.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that fixes require() calls, supporting JavaScript and TypeScript modules, enabling easy invocation, and adding code buttons for enhanced scripting capabilities.
items.title: mnaoumov/obsidian-fix-require-modules: An Obsidian plugin that fixes require() calls, supporting JavaScript and TypeScript modules, enabling easy invocation, and adding code buttons for enhanced scripting capabilities.

items.content_html: A plugin tracks occurrences and numbers in your notes
items.title: pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker: A plugin tracks occurrences and numbers in your notes

items.content_html: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.
items.title: mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.

items.content_html: Text Generator is a versatile plugin for Obsidian that allows you to generate text content using various AI providers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and local models.
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text Generator is a versatile plugin for Obsidian that allows you to generate text content using various AI providers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and local models.

items.content_html: Project Obsidian: A Resonite plugin adding extended Protoflux nodes and features for enhanced functionality and user experience
items.title: Xlinka/Project-Obsidian: Project Obsidian: A Resonite plugin adding extended Protoflux nodes and features for enhanced functionality and user experience

items.content_html: Automatically link text to corresponding entities
items.title: Ankush-Chander/obsidian-entity-linker: Automatically link text to corresponding entities

items.content_html: An Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/) plugin for sharing your notes as a GitHub gist - either privately or publicly.
items.title: timrogers/obsidian-share-as-gist: An Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/) plugin for sharing your notes as a GitHub gist - either privately or publicly.

items.content_html: A plugin to set custom font for obsidian
items.title: pourmand1376/obsidian-custom-font: A plugin to set custom font for obsidian

items.content_html: Official Instapaper plugin for Obsidian
items.title: Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper: Official Instapaper plugin for Obsidian

items.content_html: A rehype plugin that renders a json-canvas element (obsidian.md) embedded in a markdown doc.
items.title: lovettbarron/rehype-jsoncanvas: A rehype plugin that renders a json-canvas element (obsidian.md) embedded in a markdown doc.

items.content_html: A bridge between Obsidian and Github Copilot
items.title: Pierrad/obsidian-github-copilot: A bridge between Obsidian and Github Copilot

items.content_html: This is an Obsidian plugin which can easily open bookmarks without leaving the keyboard home position.
items.title: namikaze-40p/obsidian-bookmarks-caller: This is an Obsidian plugin which can easily open bookmarks without leaving the keyboard home position.

items.content_html: Secure real-time collaboration for Obsidian
items.title: peerdraft/obsidian-plugin: Secure real-time collaboration for Obsidian

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games
items.title: iron-vault-plugin/iron-vault: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games

items.content_html: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars
items.title: sytone/obsidian-queryallthethings: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars

items.content_html: Superscript comic book format plugin for Obsidian
items.title: machindo/obsidian-superscript: Superscript comic book format plugin for Obsidian
